records.imageAltText: Two women practicing yoga indoors, one in a bridge pose against a brick wall and the other sitting cross-legged on the floor touching her foot with her hand.
records.conversionNotes: Dates and location are visible near the top, which is good. However, price, yoga style, inclusions, and daily schedule are all missing from this listing. Visitor must click away to get basic facts.
records.seoNotes: No dedicated page title or H1 visible for this retreat. No schema markup evident. Location is vague ('90 min from Berlin' rather than a town name). Retreat is mixed with another retreat on the same page, diluting relevance signals.

records.price: See external link (early bird available until Feb 14)
records.imageAltText: A cozy bedroom with a bed near a large window showing trees outside, combined with an outdoor scene of a lush, green forest path at sunset.
records.conversionNotes: Location is more specific (Buckow, named venue), which is positive. However, price is hidden behind an external link, year is missing from dates, yoga style and inclusions are absent, and no schedule is provided. Visitors must visit two other sites to get basic facts.
records.seoNotes: Same issues as the first retreat: no clear title or H1 for this specific retreat, no schema, and being listed alongside another retreat on one page splits topical focus. External pricing link may confuse crawlers about canonical content.
